string.text:
DDM4 is a series of weapons configured to be suitable to all kind of combat situations suited to the user's choice. Based on the AR-15 platform, the DDM4 performs adequately well with good firing speed and moderate draw/reload speed, however they each have their own unique traits that make them stand out from each other.
 %c[0,255,255,255]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]Most basic sights and scopes
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]%c[ui_gray_1]NATO Silencer
